2605.28360.title: Prompt Codebooks: Discrete Compositional Optimization for Language Model Instruction Refinement
2605.28360.paper_summary: Automatic prompt optimization (APO) has driven significant gains in LLM-based agentic workflows. However, existing methods treat each task's prompt as a monolithic, instance-blind string optimized through global edits, producing brittle updates and preventing the reuse of learned sub-behaviors. We propose Prompt Codebooks (PCO), a novel compositional prompt optimization framework that recasts APO as discrete learning over a finite vocabulary of natural-language instincts - atomic, reusable instruction units. PCO organizes prompt-construction knowledge in a discrete codebook and routes each input to a small subset of entries via an LLM-based encoder; a generator composes them into a prompt for the frozen target model; a critic emits a structured verdict that decomposes by attribution into per-variable textual gradients, jointly training the encoder, generator, and codebook under a language-valued min-max objective. The resulting routing is per-instance: different inputs in the same task receive different instinct compositions, a regime structurally inexpressible under instance-blind methods. Across six benchmarks on Qwen3-8B and LLaMA-3.1-8B, PCO improves over zero-shot by up to +30.36 points, surpasses the strongest prior baseline (GEPA) by +3.34 on HotpotQA and +1.11 in aggregate, and reduces deployed prompt length by up to 14.1x versus MIPROv2 and 3.0x versus GEPA using only K=16 instincts.
2605.28360.paper_summary_zh: 自動提示優化（APO）在基於大型語言模型（LLM）的代理工作流程中帶來了顯著的增益。<lb/>然而，現有的方法將每個任務的提示視為一個整體的、實例盲目的字符串，通過全局編輯進行優化，這導致了脆弱的更新並阻止了學習到的子行為的重用。<lb/>我們提出了提示代碼簿（PCO），這是一種新穎的組合提示優化框架，它將APO重新構想為在有限的自然語言本能詞彙上進行離散學習——原子化的、可重用的指令單元。<lb/>PCO在一個離散的代碼簿中組織提示構建知識，並通過基於LLM的編碼器將每個輸入路由到一小部分條目；生成器將它們組合成一個針對凍結目標模型的提示；評論者發出一個結構化的判決，通過歸因分解為每個變量的文本梯度，聯合訓練編碼器、生成器和代碼簿，遵循一個以語言為值的最小-最大目標。<lb/>最終的路由是針對每個實例的：同一任務中的不同輸入接收不同的本能組合，這在實例盲方法下是結構上無法表達的。<lb/>在Qwen3-8B和LLaMA-3.1-8B的六個基準測試中，PCO在零-shot上提高了最多30.36分，超過了最強的先前基準（GEPA）在HotpotQA上提高了3.34分，總體上提高了1.11分，並且在使用僅K=16個本能的情況下，將部署的提示長度減少了最多14.1倍，相較於MIPROv2和3.0倍，相較於GEPA。
2605.28360.author: Jyotirmoy Nath et.al.
2605.28360.authors: Jyotirmoy Nath, Neeraj Kumar, Brejesh Lall
